HEARING. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON SEP-10-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSELL, RICHARD G IND/DBA B & R LAUNDRY LAIR, JEFFREY IND/DBA B & R LAUNDRY POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: EQUIPMENT:SIX 30 LB DEXTER COIN OPERATED DRYER HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $4200, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $8,443.53, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $251.79 DAMAGES, $1,175.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $184.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,610.79, DAMAGES OF $251.79 REPRESENTS INTEREST AMOUNT REQUESTED IN JUDGMENT, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH AND SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-04-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
